text: Entering this quiet, glass-walled space, I feel a sense of anticipation mingled with calm—like the hush before thought crystallizes into understanding. Crossing into the vibrantly designed R+D area, I’m swept up in curiosity. The words about sunlight, sky, and fleeting contentment echo within me, inviting openness and reflection. Here, surrounded by ideas and their artifacts, I feel enlivened by the interplay of possibility and presence, inspired by the invitation to explore how humans and technology intertwine.
